context.description:
## Objective
Construir automação para yield farming em stablecoins na Base. Módulos: (1) bridge Polygon→Base, (2) deposit/withdraw em Yearn USDC vault, (3) APY monitoring com alertas, (4) portfolio tracking no crypto-sage. NÃO depositar capital real — apenas a infra de scripts.

## Context
Quant research: Yearn USDC vault na Base tem 26.9% APY, single-sided, baixo risco. MaxAPY USDC 20.9%. Bridge Polygon→Base custa ~$0.10. Crypto-sage já tem Base connector em src/connectors/base.mjs. Wallet EVM: 0xa1464EB4f86958823b0f24B3CF5Ac2b8134D6bb1. USDC Base: 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913. Yearn USDC vault address precisa ser pesquisado. Bridge: usar deBridge ou native Base bridge.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script defi-yield/ com: bridge.py (Polygon→Base bridge), vault.py (Yearn dep

spawn_params.title: Infra: DeFi Yield Farming Automation (Base/Yearn)
